programme.title: Canada Tonight
programme.desc: Canada Tonight was a Canadian television newscast which aired on stations owned by Western International Communications from 1993 to 2001. It was produced out of the studio of CHAN-TV in Burnaby, British Columbia. There were two versions of the newscast; the one seen outside BC was anchored by Tony Parsons, and the one seen in that province was anchored by Bill Good.

programme.title: Secrets of Big Data
programme.desc: Police use facial recognition technology to arrest a suspected thief; a Canadian writer creates an artificial intelligence chat-bot to reconnect with a lost loved one; a London-based stock trader uses algorithms to beat the market at its own game.

programme.title: Secrets of Big Data
programme.desc: The owner of Canadas largest cryptocurrency exchange dies under strange circumstances; a woman suffering from a series of painful medical issues is denied access to prescription medication because an algorithm flags her as high risk to abuse drugs.

programme.desc: Lesley and Sammys feud comes to a head; Bella and her mother have a discussion.

programme.desc: Judy and Nate weigh an offer from Binh; Washington and Lesley prepare for a visit from her parents.

programme.desc: Unusual occurrences begin to unfold in the small and uneventful town of Centerville, from animals behaving oddly to irregular periods of daylight. However, the most unexpected event proves to be the most serious as corpses begin to leave their graves to attack the townspeople.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: John Cusack and Kate Beckinsale decide to let fate be their guide in this charming comedy about a man and woman who share an undeniable attraction when they meet, but concoct a series of experiments to determine if they are truly meant for each other. Jeremy Piven, Molly Shannon, John Corbett, Bridget Moynahan, Eugene Levy.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!
programme.desc: Leo Reich faces the swirling uncertainty of our collective future, asking the big questions. Treading the line between hilarious stand-up and humorless performance art, this special blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs in a valiant attempt to raise awareness about important social and political causes or something.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: The Flash sequel follows Barry Allen on time-bending adventures that alter the course of history. Harnessing his super speed to travel back in time and save his family, Allen believes he is making the world a better place. He soon discovers that his mission leads to the creation of a multiverse where General Zod is on the rise and there are no superheroes to fight him. Allen must navigate the multiverse to find Batman and convince him to save the world.

programme.title: Wonka
programme.desc: This fantasy musical film follows the story of Willy Wonka, the famous but eccentric chocolatier based on the character from Roald Dahls novel. In particular, it emphasizes his rise to the top. The narrative traces his beginnings as a young adult who started as an employee selling chocolate in a store until he became driven to enter the chocolate industry eventually. This film acts as a prequel to the 1971 film adaptation of Dahls novel.

programme.title: Ride Along 2
programme.desc: Friction continues between an aspiring cop and his seasoned partner (and future brother-in-law) as they pursue a Miami drug lord together with the help of a savvy detective.

programme.title: Magic Mikes Last Dance
programme.desc: After leaving his life of performing behind, Mike Lane soon feels adrift. Yet a chance encounter with an older woman reignites his passion for dance. The unlikely duo then ventures to London with a vision to revive the spectacle of erotic dance to inspire feelings of passion, creativity, and emotion in theatergoers.

programme.title: Road Trip
programme.desc: Tom Greens film debut casts him as a perpetual college student narrating the raucous odyssey of four university buddies as they make their way from Ithaca, N.Y., to Austin. Their goal: retrieve an illicit video, which was mailed by mistake. Breckin Meyer, Seann William Scott, Amy Smart, Paulo Costanzo, DJ Qualls, Rachel Blanchard.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: A group of hard-living teenagers travel across the US, supporting themselves by selling magazines.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: A young suburban girl is abducted by spirits that have besieged her familys home. Desperate, her parents devise a plan to rescue her from the other side.

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!
programme.desc: Leo Reich faces the swirling uncertainty of our collective future, asking the big questions. Treading the line between hilarious stand-up and humorless performance art, this special blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs in a valiant attempt to raise awareness about important social and political causes or something.

programme.title: Mirror Mirror
programme.desc: In this take on the classic fairy tale, Prince Alcott falls in love with Snow White, which prompts the Evil Queen to cast her into exile. Snow White then allies herself with a gang of pint-sized thieves in order to win back the throne and her true love.

programme.title: Free Birds
programme.desc: Two turkeys travel back in time to the first Thanksgiving in order to change the traditional menu and save their kind from being served with a side of cranberry sauce.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two out-of-work ad executives with kids go into the babysitting business and find themselves banging heads with the headmistress of a pricey childrens academy.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Someday Youll Die
programme.desc: Taped in December 2023 in front of a sold-out audience at the Moore Theater in Seattle, Washington, Glaser dives into a wide range of topics including why she doesnt want kids, the harsh realities of aging, her sexual fantasies, and plans for her own death ? all in her hilarious, unapologetic, and brutally honest style.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: A 70-year-old widower comes out of retirement to take an internship at a trendy start-up fashion company, and unexpectedly becomes a confidant for the overwhelmed young CEO.

programme.title: Definitely, Maybe
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds stars in this funny and refreshingly grown-up "romantic mystery" from writer-director Adam Brooks. Reynolds plays a jaded Manhattan ad exec who tells his 10-year-old daughter (Abigail Breslin) how he met her mother. Rachel Weisz, Elizabeth Banks, Isla Fisher.

programme.title: Paper Towns
programme.desc: A nerdy teenager falls for the enigmatic girl next door, who vanishes after the two have an adventure together one night. She leaves behind a trail of clues, which lead him and his friends to go on a road trip to find her.

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love
programme.desc: A fictional romance between a struggling young playwright named Shakespeare and a noblewoman who longs to act, and who inspires him to write "Romeo and Juliet".

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: An upbeat and unfailingly honest organic farmer turns to his sisters for help after his girlfriend leaves him, but soon after he moves in with each of them, he gets on their nerves with his naive ways. However, they eventually realise his optimism might actually be a strength.

programme.title: Spy
programme.desc: After years of doing work integral to the success of major missions, a deskbound CIA analyst is finally given the chance to go undercover in order to save her missing partner and thwart a global disaster.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Mexican teenager Jaime Reyes returns home from college full of idealism and hope for his countrys future. But his home isnt as he left it. Dejected and without direction now that his dreams have been dashed, Jaime finds an ancient scarab that turns out to be an alien symbiote. When the scarab chooses him, Jaime becomes the third incarnation of the superhero, The Blue Beetle. This film is a superhero movie based on the DC comic of the same name.

programme.title: Bachelorette
programme.desc: A single woman puts her bitterness aside in order to serve as a bridesmaid at an old friends wedding and host the wildest hens night imaginable.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: More Feelings
programme.desc: Golden Globe-winning Egyptian American actor, writer, and comedian Ramy Youssef returns to the stage to offer his unique reflections on our divided world and more. Filmed at White Eagle Hall in Jersey City, the special sees Youssef delving into issues big and small, including the 2024 presidential election, the importance of prayer, and more.

programme.title: Thank You, Have A Nice Day
programme.desc: A food delivery worker rides anxiously through the streets of New York City, but one of his deliveries turns out to be a very bitter surprise.

programme.title: Road Trip: Beer Pong
programme.desc: This hilarious, politically incorrect comedy finds Andy (Preston Jones) and two college buddies hatching a plan to enter the national beer-pong championships, but getting there requires a cross-county road trip with sexy models. Directed by Steve Rash. D.J. Qualls.

programme.title: Dream Scenario
programme.desc: The narrative follows a very unkempt professor named Paul Matthews. His life is quite uneventful until suddenly, his image appears in peoples dreams. Soon, millions of strangers find themselves dreaming about him. The event made him an overnight sensation. However, things change when these dreams soon become nightmares for some and, later, for many.

programme.title: Now You See Me

programme.title: Leo Reich: Literally Who Cares?!

Treading the line between hilarious stand-up and humorless performance art, this special blends songs, anecdotes, and anxious non-sequiturs in a valiant attempt to raise awareness about important social and political causes or something.

programme.title: Everybody Wants to Be Italian

Cerina Vincent is an engaging delight as the object of his desire, and Penny Marshall is a hoot as an opinionated florist. Written and directed by Jason Todd Ipson. Richard Libertini, John Kapelos, Marisa Petroro.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Framed for a crime they didnt commit, four ex-Special Forces operatives fight to expose the truth and clear their names.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: Misfits try to lift the Cleveland Indians out of a 34-year slump.

programme.title: Welcome Home Roscoe Jenkins

James Earl Jones, Margaret Avery, Joy Bryant, Cedric the Entertainer. Written and directed by Malcolm D. Lee.

After his sons death in 1962, Wallace decides to become a serious reporter, and a few years later, his magnum opus, 60 Minutes, is born.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Determined to avenge his family, Paul Atreides joins the Fremen to build a strong war force in preparation for his battle against the Harkonnens. He must navigate the dangerous planet and harness the power of the spice. Fulfilling his destiny as the Kwisatz Haderach, his powers grow, and he becomes more confident in leading the world to the freedom they deserve. The sequel to the 2021 film chronicles the rise of Paul Atreides as a leader and hero.

programme.title: The Bling Ring
programme.desc: A group of Los Angeles teens rob the homes of the rich and famous, but their criminal pastime turns treacherous as their obsession with luxury goods grows all-consuming.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: The musical remake centers on the struggles of Celie and Nettie Harris, two African American sisters living in Georgia in the 1900s. Enduring abuse by their father, the sisters dream of escaping their miserable life. After Celie forcibly marries a man named Albert Johnson, Nettie seeks refuge in their new home. When Albert assaults Nettie, she runs away and loses touch with Celie. What follows is a decades-spanning odyssey showcasing the willpower of two women trying to forge their own paths.

programme.title: The Lionheart
programme.desc: In 2011, two-time Indianapolis 500 champion Dan Wheldon died in a horrific crash at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway, shaking the world of motorsports to its core. Ten years later, Dans two sons, Sebastian and Oliver, follow in their fathers footsteps as they work through their loss the only way they know how by getting behind the wheel to race.

programme.title: Bridget Joness Diary
programme.desc: The romantic adventures of a thirtysomething Brit determined to find Mr Right while cutting back on her smoking, drinking and eating.

programme.title: The Women

As in the original, the film features an all-female cast, including Annette Bening, Jada Pinkett Smith, Eva Mendes and Debra Messing. programme.title: Juliet, Naked

programme.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
programme.desc: In a span of eight years, MoviePass went from being the fastest growing subscription service since Spotify to total bankruptcy, losing over $150 million in 2017 alone. programme.desc: A scientist teams with a mysterious French agent to try to stop a massive, radioactive lizard from destroying Manhattan.

programme.title: Avatar
programme.desc: In this sci-fi epic, paraplegic war veteran Jake Sully volunteers for a mission on the planet Pandora, a hostile environment where human beings can only survive by remotely controlling alien avatars. However, Jake soon realises that the Navi, a race of creatures native to Pandora, are being threatened by his own people, and he decides to join them in fighting back against mankind.

programme.title: Avatar: The Way of Water
programme.desc: The long-awaited sequel to the epic science fiction megahit Avatar, continuing the story of Jake Sullys adventures on Pandora.

programme.title: Minari
programme.desc: A Korean American family relocates to a small farm in Arkansas in the 1980s ? to pursue their own version of the American Dream. The arrival of their irreverent grandmother disrupts the balance they try to maintain between cultural assimilation and autonomy.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Determined to avenge his family, Paul Atreides joins the Fremen to build a strong war force in preparation for his battle against the Harkonnens. He must navigate the dangerous planet and harness the power of the spice. Fulfilling his destiny as the Kwisatz Haderach, his powers grow, and he becomes more confident in leading the world to the freedom they deserve. The sequel to the 2021 film chronicles the rise of Paul Atreides as a leader and hero.

programme.title: The Bling Ring
programme.desc: A group of Los Angeles teens rob the homes of the rich and famous, but their criminal pastime turns treacherous as their obsession with luxury goods grows all-consuming.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: The musical remake centers on the struggles of Celie and Nettie Harris, two African American sisters living in Georgia in the 1900s. Enduring abuse by their father, the sisters dream of escaping their miserable life. After Celie forcibly marries a man named Albert Johnson, Nettie seeks refuge in their new home. When Albert assaults Nettie, she runs away and loses touch with Celie. What follows is a decades-spanning odyssey showcasing the willpower of two women trying to forge their own paths.

programme.title: The Lionheart
programme.desc: In 2011, two-time Indianapolis 500 champion Dan Wheldon died in a horrific crash at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway, shaking the world of motorsports to its core. Ten years later, Dans two sons, Sebastian and Oliver, follow in their fathers footsteps as they work through their loss the only way they know how by getting behind the wheel to race.

programme.desc: Martial-arts action is combined with a touching love story in this Best Foreign Language Film winner about a stolen magical sword in ancient China.

programme.desc: An estranged Hollywood couple tries to appear happy at a press junket in this comedy.

programme.title: Up in the Air
programme.desc: Ryan Bingham works for a company that specialises in firing people, and hes forced to take a newcomer named Natalie along on a business trip in order to show her firsthand what he does. Along the way, Ryan begins to reflect on his lonely life and develops a relationship with fellow frequent flyer Alex Goran.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Two young men working as house cleaners experience hardships in life. One day, they are assigned to clean a huge mansion that turns out to be owned by basketball player LeBron James. The two conjure some youthful shenanigans upon learning that the celebrity will be out of town while they do their job to hopefully alleviate their dire situations, that is, to throw a huge party in the celebrity mansion.

programme.title: Dicks: The Musical
programme.desc: Two self-obsessed businessmen discover theyre long-lost identical twins and come together to plot the reunion of their eccentric divorced parents.

programme.title: Skin
programme.desc: A former Neo-Nazi faces violence when he leaves his white supremacist gang.

programme.title: War for the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Caesar, leader of the ape army in the struggle against homo sapiens, must wrestle with his own savage chimpanzee nature while leading his species to victory in this third installment of the series reboot.

programme.title: Juliet, Naked
programme.desc: Annie feels stuck in her relationship with Duncan, who obsessively runs a fan site dedicated to reclusive indie rocker Tucker Crowe. After she posts a scathing review of Crowes latest release to Duncans site, Crowe himself emails her and they begin corresponding. When he requests to meet her, both she and Duncan must confront the real man behind the pop culture icon thats influenced their lives.

programme.title: The Assistant
programme.desc: Amidst the routine of her daily tasks, the young assistant to an authoritative executive comes to recognize the sinister mistreatment underscoring her role in the office. Soon, she discovers just how vulnerable her position truly is as her career and her welfare are put into jeopardy.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: Black Adam is awakened after being imprisoned for nearly five thousand years. This significant being tries to exist in modern climes despite his brusque ways and ancient-trained means. The members of the Justice Society of America try to befriend him, hopefully retraining him as well. They need to come together soon to fight a more powerful villain about to wreak havoc on the world.

programme.title: Jurassic World
programme.desc: Twenty-two years after Jurassic Park opened on Isla Nubar, a dinosaur-themed resort attracts thousands of visitors each year, just as John Hammond envisioned. However, following a bad sag in turnout a new effort is undertaken to revitalise Jurassic World, but once again mankinds attempts to interfere with nature bring ominous results.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: A mysterious, superhuman assassin teams with a young woman to take down a major corporation plotting to use his genetic makeup to create a race of unstoppable killers.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Taut adaptation of Tom Clancys thriller about CIA agent Jack Ryan becoming unwittingly involved in drug-cartel intrigue. The third entry in the Jack Ryan film series, following "The Hunt for Red October" and "Patriot Games."

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A washed-up American actor experiences culture shock while filming a whiskey commercial in Tokyo, but finds solace in his connection with a married 20-something whose successful photographer husband is in the city on an assignment. As the unlikely pair explores Tokyo, they begin to wonder if their sudden friendship might be growing into something more.

programme.title: The Intern
programme.desc: A 70-year-old widower comes out of retirement to take an internship at a trendy start-up fashion company, and unexpectedly becomes a confidant for the overwhelmed young CEO.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: An American mob boss and his family are relocated to France through the Witness Protection Program, but they soon draw the attention of some dangerous underworld figures who are determined to see them dead.

programme.title: The Hunted
programme.desc: Past Oscar winners Tommy Lee Jones and Benicio Del Toro go one-on-one in this tense thriller. When a former special-operations soldier begins killing hunters in the Oregon wilderness, the FBI enlists a retired tracker to catch him. Directed by William Friedkin ("The French Connection," "The Exorcist"), the film features thrilling chases and plenty of suspense.

programme.title: Ted 2
programme.desc: Newlywed Ted wants to become a father, but must prove hes a person in a court of law first.

programme.title: Max
programme.desc: A military dog named Max is adopted by his late handlers grieving family, and forms a close bond with the soldiers younger brother Justin. With the help of his canine friend, Justin explores the mystery of how his sibling died.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: Upon hearing the news that a huge comet will hit Earth within 48 hours and start the dreaded apocalypse, John Garrity, his estranged wife Allison, and their son Nathan decide to make their way to Greenland, where a group of bunkers is located. The journey, however, proves to be more perilous than they anticipated. Amidst the growing panic and lawlessness around them, the family tries their hardest to catch the last flight to the last possible safe haven on the planet.

programme.title: Menashe
programme.desc: A Hasidic Jewish man fights to retain custody of his son after his wifes death, as tradition dictates that the boy must be raised in a household with a mother. If he doesnt remarry quickly, his son will be adopted by his late spouses stern brother.

programme.title: Pride and Glory
programme.desc: A detectives probe into the murder of four cops points to corruption and his own brother and brother-in-law, both of whom are cops.

programme.title: Kate and Leopold
programme.desc: The Duke of Albany is whisked through a portal in time from 1876 to modern-day New York, where he woos a jaded executive.

programme.title: Elektra
programme.desc: Reprising her role in "Daredevil," Jennifer Garner gives an electrifying performance in this entertaining Marvel Comic adaptation about an assassin who decides to protect her intended next victims from a band of supernatural ninjas.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: An investment banker attempts to cope with his wifes sudden death by becoming obsessed with physically deconstructing technologies that surround him. His complaints to a vending machine company spark an unexpected relationship with a customer service rep.

programme.title: Dying of the Light
programme.desc: A CIA agent on the verge of retirement goes rogue in order to hunt down a dangerous terrorist.

programme.title: Me and Earl and the Dying Girl
programme.desc: A misfit teenager forms an unlikely friendship with a female classmate who has leukemia. As they grow closer, she helps him with his creative endeavours and forces him to confront the messiness of real life.

programme.title: Fantasmas
programme.desc: While ignoring his landlords anxious letters, Julio purchases a gold oyster earring. He quickly loses it at the club. Julio later explains his sensitivity to forms, colors, numbers, and the alphabet to his fellow ridesharing riders.

programme.title: Stop Making Sense
programme.desc: This electrifying Talking Heads concert film directed by Oscar-winner Jonathan Demme features the New Wave band performing such hits as "Psycho Killer", "Take Me to the River" and "Burning Down the House".

programme.title: Under the Skin
programme.desc: An alien assumes the form of an alluring female and prowls the streets of Scotland, leading lonely and unsuspecting men to their doom.

programme.title: The Zone of Interest
programme.desc: Set during the Holocaust, the historical drama centers on the life of a German commandant named Rudolf Hoss. Living in a private house next to the Auschwitz concentration camp, Rudolf and his wife Hedwig dream of building the perfect family life. As the days of the Nazi occupation come to an end, the couple struggles with their different priorities.

programme.title: Ren Faire
programme.desc: King George goes on an unsuccessful date. Jeff struggles to thwart Louies bid for the crown. Darla Smith, a former elephant trainer, enters the fray with an agenda of her own.

programme.title: Ren Faire

programme.title: True Story
programme.desc: In this psychological thriller based on actual events, a disgraced journalist plays a game of cat and mouse with an accused murderer who assumed his identity while on the run.

programme.title: Aquaman and The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: The sequel follows Aquaman as he prepares for another battle against Black Manta. Equipped with the deadly Black Trident, Black Manta is determined to avenge his fathers death. With no one by his side, Aquaman seeks the help of his brother Orm, hoping to build a strong alliance that can empower him to defeat Black Manta who vows to kill him at all costs. Aquaman must push himself and overlook the differences he has with his brother to save the world from destruction.

programme.title: The Children Act
programme.desc: High Court judge Fiona Maye has to make a life-or-death decision for teenager Adam. Adam, who is almost 18 and legally a child, is refusing a vital blood transfusion that could keep him alive. A hospital visit greatly affects them both as Adams fate lies in Fionas hands.

programme.title: The Tomorrow Man
programme.desc: One is preparing for a disaster that will never happen, the other is buying things shell never need. But in a small town, these two try and find love.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: CIA analyst Jack Ryan uncovers a dark plot to crash the US economy with a terrorist attack. Ryan must fight the terrorist head on if he has any chance of saving the country.

programme.title: Deadpool
programme.desc: A bizarre experiment transforms a wise-cracking mercenary into a superpowered anti-hero.

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: In this intense sequel, Batman and idealistic district attorney Harvey Dent join forces to arrest and prosecute Gotham Citys crime lords. But the deranged Joker raises the stakes by declaring all-out war on the forces of law and order.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Two young men working as house cleaners experience hardships in life. One day, they are assigned to clean a huge mansion that turns out to be owned by basketball player LeBron James. The two conjure some youthful shenanigans upon learning that the celebrity will be out of town while they do their job to hopefully alleviate their dire situations, that is, to throw a huge party in the celebrity mansion.

programme.title: Joy
programme.desc: The tumultuous life of entrepreneur Joy Mangano, a divorced mother of two who risked her lifes savings to produce and market her invention of the Miracle Mop. The success of that invention sparked her television-shopping business empire.

programme.title: The Social Network
programme.desc: Nerdy, awkward Harvard student Mark Zuckerberg becomes a billionaire by creating the website Facebook, but he ends up embroiled in legal disputes as the friends who helped him during his rise to the top are now eager to see him fall.

programme.title: Black Swan
